text:
Created attachment 258267
Four commits to implement keepassxc-legacy and update keepassxc

This file contains four commits:

* 06831734208c 5e562ccf43ed  2025-03-03 - (HEAD -> keepassxc)  security/keepassxc: Update to 2.7.10
* 52f2440c1ddd 6fbc9f74eb58  2024-06-20 - security/keepassxc: Update to 2.7.9 
* 2cb415fb5a9f b028d2cf538e  2025-03-03 - security/keepassxc-legacy: Differentiate from security/keepassxc      
* ad4937e6f6a7 efc500aeb8bd  2025-03-03 - security/keepassxc-legacy: Repocopy from security/keepassxc
